codestar.githubrepository.s3.Bucket.Description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket that contains the ZIP file with the content to be committed to the new repository.

codestar.githubrepository.s3.Key.Description: The S3 object key or file name for the ZIP file.

codestar.githubrepository.s3.ObjectVersi.Description: The object version of the ZIP file, if versioning is enabled for the Amazon S3 bucket.
